message:
test: comprehensive test coverage for extension, tool, provider, and conformance changes

Conformance fixture runner:
  Add hashline_edit tool dispatch. Parameterize truncation direction via
  explicit "direction" field. Use DEFAULT_MAX_LINES/DEFAULT_MAX_BYTES
  constants. Add new fixture cases: CRLF/CR-only edit round-trips,
  out-of-CWD rejection for all tools, directory-vs-file discrimination,
  fuzzy ambiguity with normalized duplicates, proptest monotonicity and
  prefix/suffix invariants for truncate_head/tail, hashline BOM
  preservation. Add golden output files for find, grep, ls, read tools.

Golden corpus harness:
  Split per-run env from base_env preventing VCR state leaks between
  fixtures. parse_json_lines returns Result with line-number context.
  count_jsonl_files recurses into subdirectories. Harden session header
  and agent start/end assertions to panic on missing events. Add NDJSON
  golden corpus fixtures for json_mode and json_mode_stdin surfaces.

Extension tests:
  Add event wiring tests for nine new event types. Update ext conformance
  scenarios, API usage matrix, event payloads, and minimal_mcp fixture
  for MCP server registration.

Node.js shim tests:
  Add pbkdf2/scrypt native hostcall tests, readline/promises tests,
  node:test runner tests, assert/strict tests. Expand npm module stub
  coverage.

Provider tests:
  Update qwen variant count to 3. Add alibaba-us to WAVE_B1 preset and
  factory coherence tests. Aggregate entry count updated to 9.

Tool conformance:
  Add CWD boundary enforcement tests for all tools. Add edit whitespace
  reproduction test. Add branch edge failure coverage tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -135,7 +135,7 @@ All P0 modules (path, fs, os, child_process) have real implementations.
 ### P3 Gaps (low priority)
 - `child_process.fork` (72 calls) - throws error, not feasible in QuickJS
 - `node:net` (7 ext) - all error throws, socket ops not feasible
-- `node:test` (7 ext) - test framework, not needed at runtime
+- `node:test` (7 ext) - partial runner (test/describe/it + hooks + run); reporters/concurrency not supported
 - `node:assert/strict` (7 ext) - variant of existing assert
 - 6 modules with 1 ext each: tty, zlib, v8, perf_hooks, vm, stream/web

@@ -0,0 +1,88 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "json_mode_openai_responses_ndjson",
+  "surface": "json_mode",
+  "description": "JSON mode: OpenAI Responses NDJSON stream playback",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "json",
+    "-p",
+    "--provider", "openai",
+    "--model", "gpt-4o-mini",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off",
+    "--system-prompt", "NDJSON stream test.",
+    "Reply with NDJSON pong."
+  ],
+  "stdin": null,
+  "env_overrides": {
+    "OPENAI_API_KEY": "test-vcr-key"
+  },
+  "cassette": {
+    "version": "1.0",
+    "test_name": "golden_json_mode_openai_responses_ndjson",
+    "recorded_at": "2026-04-11T00:00:00.000Z",
+    "interactions": [
+      {
+        "request": {
+          "method": "POST",
+          "url": "https://api.openai.com/v1/responses",
+          "headers": [
+            ["Authorization", "[REDACTED]"],
+            ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+            ["Accept", "text/event-stream, application/x-ndjson, application/ndjson"]
+          ],
+          "body": {
+            "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
+            "input": [
+              {
+                "role": "user",
+                "content": [
+                  { "type": "input_text", "text": "Reply with NDJSON pong." }
+                ]
+              }
+            ],
+            "stream": true,
+            "store": false
+          }
+        },
+        "response": {
+          "status": 200,
+          "headers": [
+            ["Content-Type", "application/x-ndjson"]
+          ],
+          "body_chunks": [
+            "{\"type\":\"response.output_text.delta\",\"item_id\":\"msg_ndjson_1\",\"content_index\":0,\"delta\":\"NDJSON \"}\n",
+            "{\"type\":\"response.output_text.delta\",\"item_id\":\"msg_ndjson_1\",\"content_index\":0,\"delta\":\"pong.\"}\n",
+            "{\"type\":\"response.completed\",\"response\":{\"incomplete_details\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":9,\"output_tokens\":2,\"total_tokens\":11}}}\n"
+          ]
+        }
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code": 0,
+    "stdout_contains": [],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["error", "panic"],
+    "no_session_files": true,
+    "json_event_sequence": [
+      "session",
+      "agent_start",
+      "message_start",
+      "message_end",
+      "turn_start",
+      "message_start",
+      "message_update",
+      "message_end",
+      "turn_end",
+      "agent_end"
+    ],
+    "json_session_header": true,
+    "json_agent_start_has_session_id": true,
+    "json_agent_end_has_messages": true
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,87 @@
+{
+  "schema": "pi.golden_corpus.v1",
+  "scenario": "json_mode_stdin_openai_responses_ndjson",
+  "surface": "json_mode_stdin",
+  "description": "JSON mode with stdin: OpenAI Responses NDJSON stream playback",
+  "cli_args": [
+    "--mode", "json",
+    "--provider", "openai",
+    "--model", "gpt-4o-mini",
+    "--no-tools",
+    "--no-extensions",
+    "--no-skills",
+    "--no-prompt-templates",
+    "--no-themes",
+    "--thinking", "off",
+    "--system-prompt", "JSON stdin test."
+  ],
+  "stdin": "JSON stdin body\n",
+  "env_overrides": {
+    "OPENAI_API_KEY": "test-vcr-key"
+  },
+  "cassette": {
+    "version": "1.0",
+    "test_name": "golden_json_mode_stdin_openai_responses_ndjson",
+    "recorded_at": "2026-04-11T00:00:00.000Z",
+    "interactions": [
+      {
+        "request": {
+          "method": "POST",
+          "url": "https://api.openai.com/v1/responses",
+          "headers": [
+            ["Authorization", "[REDACTED]"],
+            ["Content-Type", "application/json"],
+            ["Accept", "text/event-stream, application/x-ndjson, application/ndjson"]
+          ],
+          "body": {
+            "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
+            "input": [
+              {
+                "role": "user",
+                "content": [
+                  { "type": "input_text", "text": "JSON stdin body" }
+                ]
+              }
+            ],
+            "instructions": "JSON stdin test.\nCurrent date and time: <TIMESTAMP>\nCurrent working directory: <CWD>",
+            "stream": true,
+            "store": false
+          }
+        },
+        "response": {
+          "status": 200,
+          "headers": [
+            ["Content-Type", "application/x-ndjson"]
+          ],
+          "body_chunks": [
+            "{\"type\":\"response.output_text.delta\",\"item_id\":\"msg_ndjson_stdin_1\",\"content_index\":0,\"delta\":\"stdin \"}\n",
+            "{\"type\":\"response.output_text.delta\",\"item_id\":\"msg_ndjson_stdin_1\",\"content_index\":0,\"delta\":\"ok\"}\n",
+            "{\"type\":\"response.completed\",\"response\":{\"incomplete_details\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":10,\"output_tokens\":2,\"total_tokens\":12}}}\n"
+          ]
+        }
+      }
+    ]
+  },
+  "expected": {
+    "exit_code": 0,
+    "stdout_contains": [],
+    "stdout_not_contains": [],
+    "stderr_not_contains": ["error", "panic"],
+    "no_session_files": true,
+    "json_event_sequence": [
+      "session",
+      "agent_start",
+      "message_start",
+      "message_end",
+      "turn_start",
+      "message_start",
+      "message_update",
+      "message_end",
+      "turn_end",
+      "agent_end"
+    ],
+    "json_session_header": true,
+    "json_agent_start_has_session_id": true,
+    "json_agent_end_has_messages": true
+  }
+}
